3283760.name: Demon Inc.
3283760.description:
About this game

It’s time to dominate the world as the newly appointed CEO of Demon Inc.! Recruit employees, acquire top-tier equipment, and wield your skills to crush rivals in this fantastical yet modern Roguelike Deck Builder.

Take over industries

From Games and News to Music, Film, and even Idols: Each industry presents unique challenges, rival CEOs, and employees to recruit. Discover specialized inventory, powerful upgrades, and strategies to refine your deck and conquer the market.

Your strategy, your playstyle

Whether you prefer a fast and aggressive approach, a slow and unyielding tank strategy, or something uniquely your own, your path to victory depends on playing the right cards at the right time.

Unlock new characters and decks

Progress through industries, encounter special events and invest your earnings to unlock additional CEOs, starter decks, and a wide range of powerful cards.

And there’s more to come

  • 5 distinct industries, each with unique powers, bosses, and rivals.

  • Hundreds of cards offer fresh strategies and surprises in every run.

  • Unlock a wealth of new content, including CEOs, starter decks, and more.

  • A captivating modern-fantastical setting set in a cutthroat corporate world.
